**Source** [Core Rulebook](/Sources.aspx?ID=1) pg. 136

_You call upon the power of nature to let loose bolts of lightning, intense weather, and elemental spells._

<title level="2">Attributes</title>

Prioritize Wisdom. You typically stay at range, so take a high Dexterity. You can choose whether to focus more on your health with Constitution or be more knowledgeable and skilled with Intelligence.

<title level="2">Skills</title>

[Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=1), [Medicine](/Skills.aspx?ID=9), [Nature](/Skills.aspx?ID=10), [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=16)

<title level="2">Order</title>
[Storm](/DruidicOrders.aspx?ID=3)

<title level="2">Higher-Level Feats</title>

[Widen Spell](/Feats.aspx?ID=315) (1st), [Storm Retribution](/Feats.aspx?ID=329) (6th), [Wind Caller](/Feats.aspx?ID=334) (8th), [Primal Focus](/Feats.aspx?ID=342) (12th), [Invoke Disaster](/Feats.aspx?ID=350) (18th)
name: Storm Druid
summary_markdown: You call upon the power of nature to let loose bolts of lightning, intense weather, and elemental spells.

<title level="1" right="Class Sample Build">[Leaf Druid](/ClassSamples.aspx?ID=21)</title>

_You’re a nurturing caretaker in tune with the natural world and the magic of life. A little plant creature called a leshy accompanies you._
